Built for construction teams

One project.Three stakeholders.One trusted truth.

Pulse AI connects Owners, Consultants, and Contractors around a single source of project truth — documents, decisions, tasks, risks, and AI insights in one operational layer.

Request DemoSee Platform
O
C
K

Trusted by 50+ UAE construction teams

THE PROBLEM

Every stakeholder works from a different version of the truth.

Drawings in one drive. Decisions in an inbox. Tasks in a spreadsheet. Risks in a slide deck. Multiplied across 3 companies — chaos is inevitable.

01

Fragmented Reality

Each company maintains its own files, statuses, and numbers. Three companies — three conflicting truths.

02

Invisible Risk

Critical decisions get buried in email threads and meeting notes. By the time risk surfaces, it is already a crisis.

03

Costly Rework

Misalignment compounds daily. By the time it surfaces, the budget variance and schedule loss are irreversible.

TRUSTED BY DEVELOPERS ACROSS THE UAE

FOR EVERY ROLE ON THE PROJECT

Three perspectives. One reality.

Each stakeholder sees exactly what they need — no more noise, no missing context. All from one shared project truth.

The Economics

Construction delays cost real money.
Pulse AI saves it.

Average delay cost on a large UAE construction project is AED 150,000 per day. A typical 70-day delay translates to AED 10M+ in lost value. Pulse AI cuts that by 30%.

AED 0K

Average delay cost

per day on large projects

0

Typical project delay

without operational truth

0%

Reduction with Pulse AI

through faster decisions

AED 0M

Saved per project

over the project lifecycle

The Platform

One operational space. All project intelligence.

Real-time decisions, risks, tasks, and AI insights — unified across Owner, Consultant, and Contractor.

One reconciled view · Streaming

RFI · OPEN

RFI-124 — slab edge detail clarification

blocks 2 tasks · L4 east

SUBMITTAL · APPROVED

SB-88 cladding panels approved

procurement unblocked

SCHEDULE

MEP rough-in wk-34 delayed +3d

3 mitigations proposed

RISK · WEATHER

Wk-34 storm — pour at risk

crane ops escalated +6h

DECISION · APPROVED

Façade vendor switch — Owner sign-off

6 docs linked · audit trail

AI

Pulse Intelligence

  • RFI-124 blocks 3 downstream tasks on L4 east. Recommend escalation to Owner by EOD.

  • Submittal SB-88 approved — procurement team should initiate PO immediately.

  • Weather risk wk-34: 68% chance of pour delay. 2 rescheduling options modelled.

Ask Pulse AI

What risks could delay wk-34 handover?

Integrations

Works with the tools already on site.

Pulse connects to your existing stack — no rip-and-replace, no retraining. Just intelligence on top of what you already use.

Proof

Teams ship projects on Pulse.

From land acquisition to handover — construction's most demanding teams trust Pulse to keep every stakeholder aligned.

ORA Developers

Bayn represents development at a scale where land, approvals, consultants, and delivery teams must operate as one. Pulse turns that complexity into a coordinated development system.

View the Bayn development scenario›
Coming Soon
Pulse Vision

Pulse Vision transforms site cameras into live construction intelligence — reading progress, activity, safety signals, and field conditions directly into the project graph.

Get early access to Pulse Vision›
Aldar

Capital projects lose value when decisions fragment and rework appears too late. Pulse keeps the project record verified, the teams aligned, and the risk visible early.

View the capital control scenario›
Emaar Group

Portfolio-scale delivery requires more than dashboards. Pulse gives leadership a live view of decisions, risks, dependencies, and delays before they become costly.

Explore the portfolio command scenario›
